courses.title: Convolutional Neural Networks
courses.description: Master image recognition, feature extraction, and CNN architectures like ResNet and VGG for computer vision tasks.
courses.topic: Convolutional Neural Networks for Computer Vision

courses.title: Recurrent Neural Networks & LSTMs
courses.description: Learn sequence modeling, time series prediction, and text generation using RNNs, LSTMs, and GRUs.

courses.title: Transformer Architecture
courses.description: Understand attention mechanisms, self-attention, and the transformer model that powers modern NLP and beyond.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning
courses.description: Explore reward-based learning, Q-learning, policy gradients, and how agents learn to make decisions.

courses.title: Generative AI & Diffusion Models
courses.description: Dive into GANs, VAEs, and diffusion models powering image generation and creative AI applications.
